---
title: "Commercial: Blondie & Scaly-man-thing-guy versus the roaches from outer space"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

1990 McCool FM - :60 second spot

---

__Scaly-man-thing-guy:__ 
I love how beams reflect off your immaculately bald head, Blondie.

__Blondie:__ 
I love how your eyes glow green with power, Scaly-man-thing-guy. 

__Scaly-man-thing-guy:__
Are you saying what I think you are saying?

__Blondie:__
Yes, with my reflective chrome dome!

__Scaly-man-thing-guy:__
And my radioactive death rays!

__Together:__
We can disintegrate all our enemies and eat all the cockroaches we want!

__ANNCR:__
This summer watch the finale of the Blondie & Scaly-man-thing-guy blockbuster franchise. From enemies, to friends, to enemies again will they finally become allies! Will they fight or flight as they encounter their greatest adversary, the Cockroach Empress in:
Blondie & Scaly-man-thing-guy versus the Roaches from outer space!
